resources.string: 1.Services – The app allows users to book vehicle services, track status, make payments, and manage service history.
2.User Account – Users must provide accurate information and keep login credentials secure.
3.Payments And Refunds – Transactions are processed securely; refund policies (if any) apply.
4.Service Providers – We connect users with service providers but do not guarantee their services.
5.User Conduct – Misuse, false information, or illegal activities are prohibited.
6.Privacy – User data is handled as per our Privacy Policy [link]..
7,Liability – We are not responsible for service interruptions or third-party actions..
8.Changes – Terms may be updated; continued use means acceptance.
9.Contact – Reach us at avishkarkedar10@gmail.com for any queries..
